comment: For this app to be useful while traveling, it needs to function without internet. So it has you download specific languages for that, alright. The text based translate works just fine, but the photo based one does not. It asks you to download a language to use this feature offline no matter what. Suppose it's just a separate download from the settings menu, nope. Even if you clear your downloads and try downloading it from the photo prompt, nothing happens, nothing downloads, doesn't work.
